#### IBM Documentation for offline environments
Do you work in a Dark shop or Airgap environment where you don't have access to the internet, but still need to use documentation to troubleshoot problems or reference guides?   
  
We have built an offline application to be able to view your product documentation in environments without internet access.
[Learn more about IBM Documentation Offline](https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/offline)
![electron-logo](https://ibm-docs-static-content.s3.us.cloud-object-storage.appdomain.cloud/electron_icon_256x256.png)

			"offlinedocs.headingtitle":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline",
			"offlinedocs.headingtext":"%20If%20you%20are%20in%20an%20airgap%20environment%20without%20access%20to%20the%20internet,%20use%20our%20Dark%20shop%20application.",
			"offlinedocs.download":"Download",

			"offlinedocs.cardheadingmac":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20for%20macOS",
			"offlinedocs.cardheadingwin":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20for%20Windows",
			"offlinedocs.cardheadinglin":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20for%20Linux",
			"offlinedocs.descriptiontitle":"Welcome%20to%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20",
			"offlinedocs.descriptiontext1":"Deploy%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20to%20view%20product%20documentation%20without%20an%20internet%20connection.%20Designed%20for%20organizations%20running%20in%20a%20dark%20shop%20environment,%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20offers%20two%20deployment%20types:",
			"offlinedocs.descriptiontext2":"Desktop%20application%20%E2%80%93%20available%20for%20macOS,%20Windows,%20or%20Linux.%20IBM%20Documentation%20desktop%20is%20built%20using%20Electron,%20a%20framework%20for%20building%20desktop%20applications%20that%20use%20web%20technologies%20such%20as%20JavaScript,%20HTML,%20and%20CSS.%20Node.js%20based,%20IBM%20Documentation%20uses%20an%20electron%20wrapper%20to%20provide%20a%20local%20desktop%20version%20that%20you%20can%20run%20offline%20from%20your%20desktop.",
			"offlinedocs.descriptiontext3":"Intranet%20version%20-%20the%20ability%20to%20host%20the%20electron%20package%20on%20an%20intranet%20server.%20This%20version%20includes%20shell%20scripts%20and%20a%20configuration%20file%20for%20your%20admin%20to%20set%20up%20the%20intranet%20deployment.%20The%20intranet%20version%20also%20includes%20a%20docker%20file%20from%20which%20you%20can%20build%20a%20Docker%20image%20to%20deploy%20IBM%20Documentation.",
			"offlinedocs.importantnote":"IMPORTANT%20NOTE:%20The%20intranet%20version%20is%20only%20available%20bundled%20with%20products%20that%20support%20it.%20The%20intranet%20version%20is%20not%20customer%20installable.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadtitle1":"Download%20and%20Setting%20up%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetupdescription1":"Setting%20up%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20application%20(the%20app)%20is%20a%20multi-step%20process:",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetupdescription2":"Download%20%E2%80%93%20requires%20you%20to%20download%20two%20different%20archived%20files.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetupdescription3":"Installation%20and%20setup%20%E2%80%93%20requires%20you%20to%20install%20the%20app%20and%20add%20the%20product%20documentation%20to%20it.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetupdescription4":"Download%20the%20app.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetupdescription5":"Download%20the%20product%20documentation%20set%20that%20you%20want%20to%20view%20and%20access%20offline.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadtitle2":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20application%20download%20instructions%20",
			"offlinedocs.downloaddescription1":"The%20application%20is%20available%20to%20download%20for%20many%20operating%20systems.%20Choose%20the%20system%20that%20best%20fits%20your%20offline%20environment%20then%20login%20with%20your%20IBMid%20to%20download%20the%20application.%20Once%20you%20have%20downloaded%20the%20application,%20transfer%20it%20to%20your%20offline%20environment%20computer.%20This%20could%20be%20done%20through%20use%20of%20a%20memory%20stick%20or%20USB%20device.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadlicencingagreementText":"Before%20downloading,%20you%20will%20be%20prompted%20to%20accept%20our%20",
			"offlinedocs.downloadlicencingagreement":"license%20agreement.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadtitle3":"Downloading%20product%20documentation%20sets",
			"offlinedocs.downloaddescription2":"You%20will%20need%20internet%20access%20to%20download%20the%20product%20documentation%20for%20use%20in%20the%20offline%20application,%20plan%20accordingly.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadstep1":"Visit%20the%20IBM%20Documentation%20page%20for%20the%20product%20documentation%20and%20specific%20version%20you%20want%20available%20offline.%20Be%20sure%20to%20navigate%20to%20a%20topic%20and%20not%20the%20welcome%20page.%20For%20example,%20for%20db2%20navigate%20to:%20%20%3Ca%20href=%22https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/db2/11.5%22%20target=%22_blank%22%3E%20https://www.ibm.com/docs/en/db2/11.5%20%3C/a%3E%20and%20select%20one%20of%20the%20topics,%20like%20%E2%80%9CAccessibility%20features%E2%80%9D",
			"offlinedocs.downloadstep2":"If%20you%20are%20not%20already%20logged%20in,%20log%20in%20with%20your%20IBMid.%20You%20must%20be%20logged%20in%20to%20access%20the%20product%20download%20in%20the%20next%20step.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadstep3":"Once%20you%20are%20logged%20in,%20at%20the%20bottom%20of%20the%20left-hand%20navigation%20click%20the%20%E2%80%9COffline%20docs%20download%E2%80%9D%20button%20to%20download%20that%20set%20of%20product%20documentation.%20This%20will%20download%20all%20available%20languages%20as%20part%20of%20the%20file.%20You%20will%20select%20which%20language(s)%20you%20would%20like%20in%20the%20upload%20phase%20inside%20the%20application.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadstep4":"The%20downloaded%20product%20documentation%20set%20is%20an%20archive%20which%20you%20can%20upload%20using%20the%20application.%20Transfer%20the%20file%20to%20your%20offline%20environment%20computer%20like%20you%20did%20for%20the%20application%20file.",
			"offlinedocs.installationtitle1":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20desktop%20application%20installation%20and%20setup",
			"offlinedocs.installandsetup":"IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20desktop%20application%20installation%20and%20setup%20is%20a%20two-step%20process:",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetup1":"install%20the%20desktop%20application%20that%20you%20downloaded,%20and%20you%20need%20to%20add%20the%20documentation%20set.",
			"offlinedocs.downloadandsetup2":"add%20the%20downloaded%20product%20documentation%20step%20to%20the%20application%20that%20you%20just%20installed.",
			"offlinedocs.installationtitle2":"Installing%20the%20desktop%20application",
			"offlinedocs.installationstep1":"When%20on%20your%20local%20machine%20in%20the%20offline%20environment,%20run%20the%20application%20to%20initiate%20the%20install.%20You%20can%20do%20this%20by%20double-clicking%20the%20application%20download%20file%20(.exe)%20or%20by%20right%20clicking%20the%20file%20and%20selecting%20%E2%80%9Copen%E2%80%9D%20or%20%E2%80%9Crun%E2%80%9D.%20Follow%20the%20on-screen%20instructions%20to%20complete%20the%20installation.",
			"offlinedocs.installationstep2":"Once%20the%20installation%20is%20complete,%20find%20the%20application%20on%20your%20computer%20(either%20as%20a%20desktop%20short%20cut%20or%20in%20your%20applications%20folder).%20The%20initial%20load%20may%20be%20slow.%20Once%20it%20is%20fully%20loaded%20you%20will%20see%20a%20blank%20home%20page%20with%20upload%20instructions.%20The%20next%20step%20is%20to%20upload%20the%20product%20documentation%20you%20need%20that%20you%20previously%20downloaded.",
			"offlinedocs.uploadtitle":"Adding%20product%20documentation%20sets%20to%20the%20Offline%20desktop%20application",
			"offlinedocs.uploadstep1":"From%20the%20application%20home%20page,%20select%20%E2%80%9Cupload%20or%20update%20docs%E2%80%9D%20from%20the%20right-hand%20menu.%20This%20will%20open%20a%20file%20explorer.%20Select%20the%20product%20documentation%20archive%20you%20download%20previously.",
			"offlinedocs.uploadstep2":"%20After%20you%20click%20upload,%20a%20card%20will%20become%20available%20on%20the%20application%20home%20page.%20You%20may%20see%20an%20indicator%20showing%20the%20loading%20status%20of%20the%20documentation%20and%20the%20search%20index.%20Once%20the%20content%20package%20finishes%20uploading%20and%20unpacking,%20a%20tile%20will%20be%20active,%20and%20you%20can%20click%20on%20it%20to%20open%20the%20product%20documentation%20offline.",
			"offlinedocs.uploadstep3":"Feel%20free%20to%20delete%20the%20documentation%20archive%20from%20your%20memory%20stick%20or%20computer.%20It%20is%20no%20longer%20needed.",
			"offlinedocs.updatetitle":"Updates",
			"offlinedocs.updatedescription1":"Now%20that%20you%20have%20your%20offline%20documentation%20running%20on%20your%20local%20machine,%20how%20do%20you%20keep%20your%20documentation%20in%20sync%20with%20the%20latest%20updates?%20The%20online%20doc%20set%20will%20indicate%20when%20content%20has%20been%20updated%20or%20added,%20and%20a%20new%20download%20is%20available.",
			"offlinedocs.updatedescription2":"While%20logged%20in,%20the%20original%20document%20download%20button%20will%20update%20to%20let%20you%20know%20if%20you%20are%20in%20sync%20or%20an%20update%20is%20available.%20Download%20the%20new%20documentation%20set%20as%20before,%20and%20re-upload%20into%20the%20application.",
			"offlinedocs.intranettitle1":"Intranet%20version",
			"offlinedocs.intranettitle2":"Downloading%20for%20intranet%20deployment",
			"offlinedocs.intranetdescription":"An%20administrator%20can%20install%20and%20deploy%20the%20help%20content%20on%20an%20intranet%20server%20behind%20a%20firewall.%20Then,%20team%20members%20can%20access%20help%20on%20their%20network%20without%20using%20the%20Internet%20or%20downloading%20content%20to%20their%20computers.%20Deploying%20for%20as%20an%20intranet%20app%20is%20a%20multi-step%20process.",
			"offlinedocs.intranetstep1":"Be%20sure%20you%20have%20a%20server%20set%20up.%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20does%20NOT%20include%20an%20app%20server.%20Node.js%20is%20required%20version%2016%20or%20higher.",

			"offlinedocs.faqtitle":"FAQs",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestiondownload":"Question:%20Why%20can't%20I%20download%20the%20intranet%20version?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswerdownload":"Answer:%20The%20intranet%20version%20is%20only%20available%20to%20internal%20IBM%20Development%20teams%20who%20have%20decided%20to%20partner%20with%20IBM%20Documentation%20and%20make%20an%20intranet%20version%20of%20the%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20product%20available%20via%20an%20intranet.%20This%20is%20typical%20for%20dark%20shops%20that%20have%20admins%20who%20manage%20documentation%20access%20or%20for%20products%20that%20do%20not%20have%20UIs,%20but%20a%20console.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion1":"Question:%20When%20will%20the%20macOS%20version%20be%20available?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer1":"Answer:%20macOS%20version%20is%20pending%20certification.%20You%20can%20still%20download%20the%20mac%20version,%20but%20you%20need%20to%20click%20Allow%20when%20you%20get%20the%20error%20message.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion2":"Question:%20I%20downloaded%20for%20Linux,%20and%20I%20cannot%20open%20the%20executable.%20How%20can%20I%20fix%20this?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer2":"Answer:%20If%20running%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20on%20Linux,%20if%20double%20click%20doesn't%20work%20to%20open%20the%20application,%20then%20you%20need%20to%20drag%20and%20drop%20it%20to%20the%20terminal%20to%20run%20the%20application.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion3":"Question:%20How%20do%20videos%20and%20links%20work%20in%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer3":"Answer:%20If%20a%20content%20collection%20points%20to%20other%20collections,%20those%20linked%20collections%20are%20included%20in%20the%20download%20and%20all%20links%20will%20work.%20For%20external%20links,%20all%20links%20should%20work%20if%20you%20are%20online%20and%20have%20internet%20access.%20If%20you%20are%20not%20online,%20like%20with%20previous%20versions%20of%20our%20dark%20shop%20application%20(known%20as%20KCCI),%20external%20links%20will%20not%20work,%20like%20when%20Knowledge%20Center%20Customer%20Installable%20(KCCI)%20was%20deployed%20offline.%20Videos%20%E2%80%93%20if%20videos%20are%20embedded%20into%20a%20topic%20and%20stored%20in%20IBM%20Documentation%20cloud%20object%20storage,%20customers%20will%20be%20able%20to%20access%20videos,%20otherwise%20videos%20will%20not%20play.%20If%20you%20are%20online%20and%20video%20is%20not%20restricted%20in%20any%20way,%20it%20will%20open%20and%20play%20correctly.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion4":"Question:%20How%20does%20search%20work?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer4":"Answer:%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20uses%20the%20Flex%20search%20engine,%20whereas%20IBM%20Documentation%20hosted%20site%20search%20is%20unified%20with%20IBM%20masthead%20search,%20which%20uses%20the%20Elastic%20search%20engine.%20This%20difference%20means%20that%20search%20results%20will%20be%20similar%20but%20will%20not%20be%20identical.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion5":"Question:%20Does%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20notify%20me%20when%20there%20is%20updated%20content%20to%20download?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer5":"Answer:%20Not%20yet%20but%20coming%20soon%20we%20will%20introduce%20this%20feature%20that%20notifies%20anyone%20using%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20that%20the%20application%20and/or%20the%20content%20have%20been%20updated.",
			"offlinedocs.faqQuestion6":"Question:%20Can%20I%20add%20custom%20content%20to%20my%20offline%20version?",
			"offlinedocs.faqAnswer6":"Answer:%20Post%20MVP,%20we%20will%20introduce%20this%20feature%20that%20allows%20you%20to%20upload%20your%20own%20content%20into%20IBM%20Documentation%20Offline%20in%20a%20custom%20folder%20to%20search%20and%20access%20within%20the%20offline%20version.",
